scripts.postinstall: rm -rf public/cesium && cp -r node_modules/cesium/Build/Cesium public/cesium && node scripts/patch-cesium.mjs || true
scripts.perf:test:docker: mkdir -p perf-results && docker build -f Dockerfile.perf -t owb-perf . && docker run --rm -v "$PWD/perf-results:/app/perf-results" -e PERF_RUNS=${PERF_RUNS:-5} -e PERF_MEASURED_RUNS=${PERF_MEASURED_RUNS:-5} -e PERF_WARMUP_RUNS=${PERF_WARMUP_RUNS:-1} -e PERF_FAIL_P95_MS=${PERF_FAIL_P95_MS:-300} -e PERF_FILTER_OUTLIERS=${PERF_FILTER_OUTLIERS:-1} owb-perf
